title: austrobrickellia patens var. patens
intro: Austrobrickellia patens var. patens is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. It is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other compounds. The health benefits of Austrobrickellia patens var. patens include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its use in traditional herbal preparations such as teas and tinctures.
